title: exacum courtallense var. travancorica
intro: Exacum courtallense var. travancorica, also known as Travancore exacum, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Exacum courtallense var. travancorica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by making teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, with the most common preparation being a decoction made from the roots and leaves.
